profile.name: Abdullah Mehtab
profile.headline: Offensive Security Engineer / Computer Science Graduate
profile.summary: Offensive security, engineering breadth, and practical systems work across security, DevOps, backend, AI/ML, IoT, and applied mathematics.

0.speaker: Guide
lines: Welcome to Abdullah's 3D Portfolio Drive.
Use WASD or arrow keys to move.
Walk up to people and signs, then press SPACE to interact.
Explore the buildings to discover my experience, projects, education, skills, certificates, and contact details.
Have fun.

1.speaker: Security NPC
lines: Name: Abdullah Mehtab.
Current role: Offensive Security Engineer at Tkxel.
Profile: Computer Science graduate with a Mathematics minor from Forman Christian College.
Security work: authorized web/API assessments, vulnerability research, OWASP-aligned remediation, reporting, and ongoing HTB/PortSwigger practice.
Core security stack: Burp Suite, Nmap, Nessus, Metasploit, Wireshark, BeEF, SQLMap, Wazuh, ELK, Suricata, log analysis, threat intelligence, and security monitoring.

2.speaker: Skills Terminal
lines: Programming: Bash, Python, C, C++, Java, JavaScript, HTML/CSS, and MIPS Assembly.
Cyber Security: Metasploit, Burp Suite, Nmap, Nessus, Wireshark, BeEF, SQLMap, Wazuh, OWASP Top 10, vulnerability assessment, threat intelligence, log analysis, and security monitoring.
DevOps, Cloud, and IaC: AWS, Git, Terraform, Ansible, Docker, Docker Compose, Kubernetes, Jenkins, GitHub Actions, SonarQube, Prometheus, Grafana, and ELK Stack.
Machine Learning and Data Science: TensorFlow, time-series forecasting, EDA, feature engineering, model evaluation, and data visualization.
Embedded and IoT: Arduino, Raspberry Pi, ESP32, automation, and computer architecture.
Mathematics: probability and statistics, multivariate calculus, linear algebra, differential equations, numerical computing, and discrete math.

3.speaker: Cyber Sentinel Archive
lines: Final Year Project: Cyber Sentinel - Security Monitoring SIEM.
Goal: make SIEM-style monitoring practical for small environments using open-source tools, automated deployment, and alerting.
Stack: Wazuh, ELK Stack, Suricata IDS, Python, deployment automation, dashboards, and email alerting.
Engineering focus: visibility, investigation, repeatable deployment, documentation, and small-environment cost constraints.
Outcome: a portfolio-grade security project demonstrating SIEM architecture, IDS integration, alerting, log analysis, automation, and explainable security engineering.

4.speaker: DevOps Pipeline Display
lines: Project: DevOps Production Environment.
Infrastructure and deployment practice using Terraform, Ansible, Docker, Jenkins, GitHub Actions, SonarQube, Prometheus, Grafana, and ELK-style observability thinking.
Related work: backend demos, deployment architecture, monitoring stacks, dashboards, logs, and production-style engineering workflows.
Cloud and tooling: AWS, Git, Docker Compose, Kubernetes, Jenkins, GitHub Actions, Prometheus, Grafana, and ELK Stack.

5.speaker: Work Experience Log
lines: 09/2025 - Present: Offensive Security Engineer at Tkxel.
Work includes authorized full-scope security assessments on production web and API assets.
Responsibilities include identifying systemic architectural and logic-based flaws and communicating organizational risk.
Collaborates with developers on remediation aligned with OWASP Top 10.
07/2025 - 08/2025: Engineering Intern at Tkxel, rotating through BA, UI/UX, development, SQA, cybersecurity, and DevOps mentorship.
09/2023 - 07/2025: Teacher Assistant at Forman Christian College, managing course records, quizzes, assignments, and weekly undergraduate lab sessions.
03/2023 - 01/2025: Remote Developer and Project Manager, delivering automation scripts, data processing tools, algorithmic programs, technical research, documentation, and reports.

lines: Bachelor's in Computer Science with a Minor in Mathematics.
Institution: Forman Christian College (A Chartered University), Lahore.
CGPA: 3.9.
Recognition: Vice Rector's / Dean's Honor List for academic excellence.
Intermediate F.Sc Pre-Engineering: KIPS College, 2018 - 2020.
Matriculation: Allied School System, 2016 - 2018.
